blocks.value:
flowchart LR
  A[Alert] --> R[readiness 503]
  R --> O[read-only/revoke/isolate]
  O --> E[preserve evidence]
  E --> F[root-cause fix]
  F --> V[tests + smoke]
  V --> P[controlled reopen]

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Verify schema/integrity, storage and protected metrics.
en: Verify schema/integrity, storage and protected metrics.

text.ru: Keep traffic closed when readiness is 503; preserve requestId evidence and fix the root cause.
text.en: Keep traffic closed when readiness is 503; preserve requestId evidence and fix the root cause.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Verify every mutation fails with SERVER_READ_ONLY.
en: Verify every mutation fails with SERVER_READ_ONLY.

text.ru: If any mutation succeeds, isolate the instance; a hidden UI button is not protection.
text.en: If any mutation succeeds, isolate the instance; a hidden UI button is not protection.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

text.ru: Do not copy an active SQLite file as a backup.
text.en: Do not copy an active SQLite file as a backup.

alt.ru: Backup/restore verification without keys or paths.
alt.en: Backup/restore verification without keys or paths.

caption.ru: Integrity, schema, off-host copy and smoke evidence.
caption.en: Integrity, schema, off-host copy and smoke evidence.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Confirm integrity and supported backup path.
Create encrypted backup and verify readability.
en: Confirm integrity and supported backup path.
Create encrypted backup and verify readability.

text.ru: Reject manual active-DB copies and backups that fail integrity/readability.
text.en: Reject manual active-DB copies and backups that fail integrity/readability.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Verify users, rooms, messages, files, audit and version-applicable Trust/Pulse state.
en: Verify users, rooms, messages, files, audit and version-applicable Trust/Pulse state.

text.ru: On incompatible schema/files keep the target isolated; never merge partial stores.
text.en: On incompatible schema/files keep the target isolated; never merge partial stores.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Verify Server ID/fingerprint over a trusted channel.
Check exact Origin and proxy headers.
en: Verify Server ID/fingerprint over a trusted channel.
Check exact Origin and proxy headers.

text.ru: Treat unexplained fingerprint change as an incident; never bypass certificate warnings.
text.en: Treat unexplained fingerprint change as an incident; never bypass certificate warnings.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

text.ru: Do not recreate group state blindly; investigate stable scope/epoch errors.
text.en: Do not recreate group state blindly; investigate stable scope/epoch errors.

rows.ru: Prerequisites
rows.en: Prerequisites

rows.ru: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.
rows.en: Authorised operator, current version, timestamps/requestId and sanitised evidence.

rows.ru: Verification
rows.en: Verification

rows.ru: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.
rows.en: Expected state is observable and direct API checks cannot bypass the control.

ru: Classify policy, MIME/size, quota, storage or upstream failure.
Verify actual bytes/MIME and temp cleanup.
Reuse the same Idempotency-Key for purchase retry.
Verify core messaging during Pulse outage.
en: Classify policy, MIME/size, quota, storage or upstream failure.
Verify actual bytes/MIME and temp cleanup.
Reuse the same Idempotency-Key for purchase retry.
Verify core messaging during Pulse outage.

text.ru: Do not bypass room policy or raise limits to hide the symptom.
text.en: Do not bypass room policy or raise limits to hide the symptom.
